c1.criterion_text: Learn interrupt and State 3 explicitly spawn subagent($persist-rubrics-context) with Request builders and Response merge documented.

c2.criterion_text: Response/Request schema SoT is callee call-contract.md; adapt does not redefine schema fields.

c3.criterion_text: Coupling is one-way: adapt points to persist skill; adapt does not ship write-engine assets (no local memory-protocol/validator scripts).

c4.criterion_text: skill_creator init_skill.py and quick_validate.py appear only as materialization helpers (State 1.5 / local-skill-output), not as co-review or persist writers.

c5.criterion_text: State 3 is documented as audit gate only (PERSIST_OK, pending flush via subagent), not as implementer of JSON memory writes.

c6.criterion_text: Reflection is invoked via references/reflection-paradigm.md (internal), not as $another-skill.

c7.criterion_text: Helper scripts are resolved from installed skill directories (skill_creator / persist_rubrics_context), not assumed in the target repo.
